stemHtml: Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: A clearway is an area beyond the runway which can be used for an aborted take-off.
options.b: If a clearway or a stopway is used, the liftoff point must be attainable at least at the end of the permanent runway surface.
options.c: A stopway means an area beyond the take-off runway, able to support the aeroplane during an abandoned take-off.
options.d: An underrun is an area beyond the runway end which can be used for an aborted take-off.
